title: anisomeles albiflora
intro: Anisomeles albiflora, also known as white flower anisomele, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia, belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, Anisomeles albiflora has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, digestive problems, and fever, as well as its potential in lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Anisomeles albiflora can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional massage oils and creams.
